comments.author: @OwaUg
comments.text: Congo is too big for it to be run profitably or meaningfully in a manner that enables its citizens to benefit from its enormous wealth. Comparable countries in size like USA, Russia, Sudan and China have large swathes of their territories as being uninhabitable which enables the countries to concentrate development in the habitable zones of their territories. But this is not the case for DRC. Its entire territory is covered with minerals, water, fertile soils etc. As such, self seeking players will always have find a way to stake their claim in some section and curve out a niche for themselves to exploit. This is not sustainable regardless of how you look at it. Balkanization is the only way forward for DRC just like the case was for eastern Europe.

replies.author: @EpicEarthYTB
replies.text: I appreciate the deep dive into the geopolitical challenges of the DRC. рЯЩП ItвАЩs true that the countryвАЩs vast resources and size make it a target for exploitation and a nightmare to govern effectively. Thank you for adding this historical and geographical context to the conversation. Please continue to follow our journey and support the channel! вЭ§пЄПвЬ®рЯЗ®рЯЗ©
